tips_en: Start with HY-World 2.0 if you're interested in 3D scene generation, as it presents a comprehensive framework bridging world reconstruction and generation that serves as a foundation for understanding modern multi-modal scene understanding. RationalRewards' reasoning-based evaluation approach is directly relevant to HY-World 2.0's assessment, while DR3-Eval's methodology for reproducible benchmarking offers valuable insights for evaluating complex generative systems across all three papers.
tips_zh: 如果你对3D场景生成感兴趣，建议从HY-World 2.0开始阅读，因为它提出了一个综合框架，弥合了世界重建与生成之间 previously separate 的范式，可作为理解现代多模态场景理解的基础。RationalRewards的推理评估方法与HY-World 2.0的评估直接相关，而DR3-Eval的可复现基准测试方法为评估所有三个论文中的复杂生成系统提供了宝贵经验。
